case_title: OBDULIA PANIAGUA VS. THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA et al****CASE TRANSFERRED TO SAN JOAQUIN COUNTY****

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PANIAGUA, OBDULIA SERVED FEB-20-2008, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT SAKAI DDS, GARY H.

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT GARY SAKAI'S MOTION TO CHANGE VENUE CONTINUED FROM MAY-06-2008 TO LAW AND MOTION AT JUN-03-2008, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: CONTINUED TO JUNE 3, 2008 ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT LOC TRAN'S JOINDER MOTION TO CHANGE VENUE. COURT ADOPTS AND MODIFIES ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED. COURT FINDS THERE ISN'T ANY ACT THAT HAS BEEN ARTICULATED, EITHER IN THE COMPLAINT OR IN THE ORAL ARGUMENT THAT CAN FORM A BASIS FOR VENUE IN THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO. THE COMPLAINT MAKES CLEAR THAT THE NEGLIGENT ACT GIVING RISE TO PLAINTIFF'S INJURY OCCURRED IN SAN JOAQUIN COUNTY. THE COMPLAINT FAILS TO PLEAD FACTS ESTABLISHING A BASIS FOR THE REGENT'S TO KNOW THE NATURE OF PLAINTIFF'S INJURY AND SUCH ALLEGATIONS WOULD BE CONTRARY TO THE FACTS ALLEGED AS TO DR. TRAN. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
